calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-02-2015 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-02-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Entry of Judgment. Defendant did not appear.
Department 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Brndon Tang, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff CACH, LLC.
No appearance on behalf or by Defendant MARTIN MUELLER.
Angelica Martinez sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.
Defendants Does 1 -10 are ordered dismissed without prejudice.
After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff Cach, LLC and against Defendant Martin Mueller as follows:
Principal $15,062.88
Pre-Judgment Interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $490.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $15,552.88
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-12-2014 Continued To Feb-02-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-21-2014 Set For Trial On Nov-24-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
